_comment_1: Copy this file to system-instructions.json and edit to your needs.
_comment_2: The proxy looks for the real config at (first match wins):
_mode_meaning: prepend = your rules before client system; append = after; replace = only yours; off = passthrough
_strict_meaning: false = warn and skip missing files; true = throw error on any missing required file

wrapper._comment: Optional. Leave empty strings to just concatenate files.
